title: wedelia perfoliata
intro: Wedelia perfoliata, also known as Mexican daisy or Wedelia, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Americas and is commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Wedelia perfoliata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Wedelia perfoliata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
